steps.name: all_boards_initial
steps.analysis: Detected PCA9685 addresses do not match the configured hardware. Detected 0x40; expected 0x40, 0x41, 0x42, 0x43; missing 0x41, 0x42, 0x43. If multiple boards are firing together, check the A0-A5 address jumpers so each board has a unique I2C address.

steps.analysis: Detected PCA9685 addresses do not match the configured hardware. Detected 0x40; expected 0x40, 0x41, 0x42, 0x43; missing 0x41, 0x42, 0x43. If multiple boards are firing together, check the A0-A5 address jumpers so each board has a unique I2C address.

summary: At least one board did not answer during its one-board test. Fix power or I2C wiring before changing addresses.
